markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy based on recent performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Competitive content is the top priority.** It tripled MoM signups, with "Whisper vs. Deepgram" and "11 Labs alternative" being key drivers.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [**The 23-article backlog will be published over \~4 weeks.** This maintains a strategic buffer and will include weekly TTS coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**New content will focus on competitive topics.** This includes granular comparisons with 11 Labs and a post on a recent third-party TTS benchmark where Deepgram ranked well.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [**The STT language page rollout is imminent.** The Sanity integration is the final blocker, with an update expected this week.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategic Shift

  - [Data from SEMrush and Dreamdata shows competitive content is the primary driver of new signups.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [**Result:** Console signups tripled MoM since the content program restarted in late September/early October.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [**Top Performers:** "Whisper vs. Deepgram," "11 Labs alternative," and "Google text-speech comparison."](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [This success validates a data-driven approach and justifies a strategic shift to prioritize more competitive content.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)

### New Content Priorities

  - [**Top Priority → Competitive Content**](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [**Focus:** Granular comparisons with 11 Labs (e.g., language coverage, security) to capture search traffic from a larger competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
      - [**New Idea:** A post on a recent third-party TTS benchmark where Deepgram performed well.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [**Supporting Priorities (for approval)**](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [**QSR Content:** Backfill topics based on new keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [**Enterprise Production & Deployment:** Expand this cluster, which currently has only three articles.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)

### Publication Plan & Backlog

  - [A 23-article backlog is ready for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Decision:** Publish over \~4 weeks to maintain a strategic buffer.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [**Cadence:** Include weekly TTS coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [**Coordination:** Jose and Troy will sync to avoid conflicts with major company announcement articles.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Cover Images:** Jose and Troy will sync on a new strategy to make images more reflective of the article's content.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Language Page Rollout

  - [**STT Language Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [**Status:** The Sanity template is ready.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Engineering is integrating with Sanity; an update is expected by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Publishing could begin as early as next week.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [**TTS Language Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
      - [**Plan:** Hasan will wireframe a new template for upcoming TTS language launches.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
      - [Schedule 1-on-1 with Troy to coordinate the publication calendar around company announcements.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Sync with Troy on the new cover image strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [**Hasan:**](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
      - [Ideate new competitive content topics, focusing on 11 Labs.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
      - [Wireframe the new template for TTS language pages.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [**Troy:**](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
      - [Approve new content ideas in Airtable by changing the status to "approved."](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
      - [Confirm the final Sanity migration timeline with Patricia.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
      - [Provide an EOW update on the Sanity integration for STT language pages.](https://fathom.video/share/iHDt_quyiuYbxUiyx2yqB9b5_PQsoef7?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
